$comment: Camp building lines (design §9) — the repeatable GOODS sink now that money is XP. Named §9 upgrades are milestone levels of their line (milestoneUpgradeIds); every further level costs the material bundle below scaled by costGrowth.building^L forever, where L is the line's current total level (bought + owned milestones), paid from camp stock. perLevel is what each BOUGHT level grants; milestone levels grant their upgrade's own effects. Lines named fire/forge/bench gate the matching recipe station: a recipe needs its station line at level >= its stationLevel (iron heat = forge 2). Material bundles are all first-pass placeholders (design §10) — tune in balance.
